zh.lifeSummary: 當Reina Elizabeth Touchet於1410年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，她的父親Sir John Touchet Lord Audley39歲，母親Elizabeth de Stafford35歲。她於大約1430年與John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1499年在英國享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reina Elizabeth Touchet于1410年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Sir John Touchet Lord Audley39岁，母亲Elizabeth de Stafford35岁。她于大约1430年与John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1499年在英国享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Touchet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anastasie, Denys, Evest, Minos, Rodolph, Vernice.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by a small grove, from a diminutive of Old French toche ‘grove’.
History: René Touchet from Thorigné-d'Anjou in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Caillé in Saint-Laurent, Île-de-Montreal, QC, in 1746.

variants.name: Touchette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Armand, Collette, Euclide, Henri, Hilaire, Huguette.
Altered form of French Touchet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Reina Elizabeth Touchet was born in 1410, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Touchet Lord Audley, was 39 and her mother, Elizabeth de Stafford, was 35. She married John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville about 1430. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1499, in England, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reina Elizabeth Touchet est née en 1410, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Touchet Lord Audley, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Stafford, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville environ 1430. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1499, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reina Elizabeth Touchet 1410 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Touchet Lord Audley 39 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Stafford 35. Sie hat um 1430 John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1499 im Alter von 89 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reina Elizabeth Touchet è nata il nel 1410 nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Touchet Lord Audley, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Stafford, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville circa 1430. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1499, nel England, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reina Elizabeth Touchetが1410年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Touchet Lord Audleyは39歳，母Elizabeth de Staffordは35歳であった。約1430年にJohn Combe , Sir Knight of Baskervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1499年にイギリスで89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reina Elizabeth Touchet(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Touchet Lord Audley(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Stafford(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 대략 1430년 John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1499년 영국에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reina Elizabeth Touchet nasceu em 1410, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Touchet Lord Audley, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Stafford, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville aproximadamente 1430. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1499, em Inglaterra, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reina Elizabeth Touchet родилась в 1410 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Touchet Lord Audley было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Stafford, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville около 1430 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1499 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reina Elizabeth Touchet nació en 1410, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Touchet Lord Audley, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Stafford, tenía 35 años. Se casó con John Combe , Sir Knight of Baskerville aproximadamente 1430. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1499, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años.
